original_image_tags: A scanned page containing two hand-drawn sketches on a single sheet of paper. The sheet shows two punched holes at the top edge.

A pencil or ink sketch depicting a landscape view. In the foreground, a body of water meets a low horizon line. Above the horizon, a disc-shaped or lenticular object is shown, rendered with curved lines to indicate a three-dimensional, saucer-like form. Above the object, irregular cloud formations are sketched across the sky. The drawing is enclosed in a rectangular border. Two dark, circular shapes are visible along the top edge of the page, likely punch holes.

A faint pencil sketch depicting a dome-shaped or saucer-shaped object with a flattened top and curved sides, possibly resting on or emitting a central pedestal or beam of light downward. The sketch is enclosed in a rectangular border.

elements.description: A vertically oriented black-and-white sketch depicting a dark, ringed or saucer-shaped object flying through a cloudy sky. The object is positioned in the center, below horizontal cloud formations. The image is framed with a black border and appears slightly grainy.
A horizontally oriented black-and-white sketch depicting a disc-shaped object with a domed top and a dark underside. The image is framed with a black border and appears faint and grainy.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on two sketches and the general shape of the objects (disc/saucer), but Description A provides additional detail about a landscape scene, punch holes, and a pedestal/beam of light that B omits without contradiction.
